title: 工具配对原则：发现 + 行动

body.concept: Anthropic 的内置工具是按「配对使用」设计的。常见的 agent 模式中，工具组合遵循同一个原则：一个工具负责「发现/获取」信息，另一个负责「处理/执行」动作。例如 web_search（发现）+ code_execution（处理），text_editor（读取）+ bash（执行）。这些组合是起点，不是固定方案，可根据任务自由混搭。
body.analogy: 就像厨师的刀具总是成对使用——菜刀切配料（发现/准备），锅铲翻炒（执行/完成）。你不会只用一把刀做完整道菜，也不会把所有刀具全摆出来。选择覆盖当前工作流互补阶段的最小工具组合即可。

body_en.concept: Anthropic's built-in tools are designed to work in pairs. Common agent patterns follow one principle: one tool discovers or gathers information, another processes or acts on it. For example, web_search (discover) + code_execution (process), text_editor (read) + bash (execute). These combinations are starting points, not prescriptions — mix them to fit your task.
body_en.analogy: Like a chef's tools used in pairs — a knife to prep ingredients (discover/prepare) and a spatula to cook (execute/finish). You wouldn't use just one tool for the whole dish, nor lay out every tool you own. Pick the minimal set that covers complementary stages of your workflow.

diagram:
```
flowchart LR
  subgraph Discovery
    A[web_search]
    B[text_editor]
    C[MCP query tools]
  end
  subgraph Action
    D[code_execution]
    E[bash]
    F[MCP write tools]
  end
  Discovery -->|Claude decides when to switch| Action
```
